'''Scanner packs''' were commonly used by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] patrols on worlds such as [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They could detect technology and lifeforms.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 31|''Star Wars'' (1977) 31]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 31}} {{1st}}
